items.br: Extrai a hierarquia gerencial com cadeia de reporte, assignments, cargos e nomes dos gestores. Fundamental para delegação de autoridade, span of control e organogramas.
items.en: Extracts the managerial hierarchy with reporting chain, assignments, positions, and manager names. Fundamental for authority delegation, span of control, and org charts.
items.es: Extrae la jerarquía gerencial con cadena de reporte, assignments, cargos y nombres de los gestores. Fundamental para delegación de autoridad, span of control y organigramas.
